title: Akastor ASA: Successful placement of new USD 150m senior secured bonds by HMH
text: OSLO, Norway, Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Akastor ASA's (OSE: AKAST) 50% owned affiliate HMH Holding B.V. ("HMH") has today successfully completed a USD 150 million senior secured bond issue with a tenor of 3 years.

title: Permian Oil Drilling Rig Count Increases in 7 of Past 10 Weeks

title: Baker Hughes Tops Q4 Revenue Estimates, Clocks Order Growth Of 28%
text: Baker Hughes Co (NASDAQ: BKR) reported fourth-quarter revenue growth of 8% sequentially and flat year-over-year to $5.52 billion, beating the consensus of $5.49 billion. Orders grew by 28% Y/Y to $6.7 billion and were up 24% sequentially.

title: Baker Hughes (BKR) Q4 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Baker Hughes (BKR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -13.79% and 0.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Baker Hughes shares up 1.2% premarket as revenue tops estimates
text: Shares of Baker Hughes Co. BKR, -1.90% rose 1.2% premarket Thursday, after the oilfield products and services company posted better-than-expected revenue for the fourth quarter, offsetting a profit miss. The company posted net income of $294 million, or 32 cents a share, down from $653 million, or 91 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Baker Hughes posts Q4 profit as higher oil prices spur drilling demand
text: Baker Hughes Co on Thursday reported an adjusted quarterly profit compared with a year-ago loss, as producers took advantage of a rise in crude prices that fueled demand for oilfield service equipment.

title: Baker Hughes Company Announces Fourth Quarter and Total Year 2021 Results

title: Baker Hughes reports biggest weekly rise in U.S. oil-drilling rigs since October
text: Baker Hughes BKR, +2.99% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil was up by 11 to 492 this week. That followed a rise of just one oil rig the week before, and marked the biggest weekly climb since October, Baker Hughes data show.

title: Akastor ASA: HMH mandate announcement and contemplated bond issuance
text: OSLO, Norway, Jan. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Akastor ASA's (OSE: AKAST) 50% owned affiliate HMH has today mandated DNB Markets, Nordea, Pareto Securities and SEB as joint lead managers to arrange a series of fixed income investor calls commencing Monday 17 January. A 3-year USD-denominated senior secured bond issue with an expected size of minimum USD 150 million may follow, subject to inter alia market conditions.
